response.justification: Strong staff-level engineer with directly relevant current work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, plus solid TypeScript and AWS experience. However, resume lacks evidence of the required 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions—current AI focus appears to have started just 2 months ago. Critically missing: Python (required language), vector databases, RAG architectures, and demonstrated LLM/data pipeline expertise. Current trajectory is promising but experience gap against core requirements is significant.
strengths: Staff-level proven across multiple roles with strong technical leadership (Altom, NI, re:cinq) and mentoring demonstrated through workshops and open source
Current role directly targets the job scope: AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflows at re:cinq since April 2025
Strong TypeScript and full-stack engineering foundation with AWS CDK, Docker, CI/CD, and 10+ years shipping production systems across web, mobile, and infrastructure
concerns: No Python listed in skills despite being one of the two primary required languages and essential for GenAI roles; the required 8+ years of AI-driven solutions not evident in resume history
AI/ML focus appears very recent (2 months at re:cinq); no prior roles mention vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM optimization, or production AI system delivery
Data pipeline experience limited to microservices/metadata handling at Dunnhumby; no evidence of structured/unstructured data ETL, ML feature engineering, or evaluation pipelines for AI systems

key_factors.factor: Current role in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks
Missing Python and vector database/RAG expertise
